input: RDF knowledge graph (user-item interactions with object and datatype properties)
backbone: various GNNs (e.g., GCN, GAT, GraphSAGE) adapted for RDF graph structure
key_idea: integrate RDF knowledge graphs with GNNs by leveraging both topological (object properties) and content (datatype properties) information for recommendation
datasets: multi-million-node RDF graphs (not named in abstract)
